home.title: OpenClaw Variant Atlas

home.description: Default view is neutral facts. Switch to opinion layer to read editorial takes.

directory.servicesSubtitle: Security, infrastructure, hosting, and hardware ecosystem projects.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.intro: The directory separates facts from opinions to keep content verifiable and transparent.
rules: Facts layer only includes verifiable statements with source links.
Opinion layer is explicitly marked as editorial perspective.
Each item must have at least one evidence source.
Satire/Fake category is used for satirical or intentionally experimental positioning.
methodology.disclaimer: This website is not investment, legal, or security advice. Validate claims in your own environment.
